pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + Fast Causal N-Gram Tilt & Subword Certainty— 1.1052 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fuses Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels, widens MLP 3.5× with Hessian-guided mixed int5/int6 quant, and adds a fast causal n-gram tilt.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA + CUTLASS EVT MLP kernels with precomputed activation gradient
MLP 3.5× capacity via Hessian-ranked mixed int5/int6 quant
GPU-side causal n-gram tilt with subword certainty overrides
